title: thalictrum foetidum subsp. olidum
intro: Thalictrum foetidum subsp. olidum, also known as stinking meadow rue or false rue, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Ranunculaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic activities. Consuming the plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as aiding digestion, reducing fever, and alleviating rheumatic pain. Thalictrum foetidum subsp. olidum can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed for its medicinal and health benefits.
